lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Good day. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd like a drink please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on in town?

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Nothing much really. About what you'd expect from a sleepy little town like ours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about those two gangs? That seems exciting.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: They're paying customers, so I won't rock the boat if you don't mind.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm ok. Thanks for your time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for Traitorous Ali.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: He was just here! Look, he's even left his drink on the table by those barrels. Must have nipped out to go to the toilet.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: He might be gone a while though. The nearest outhouse is all the way over on Fossil Island.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for Ali from Pollnivneach.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Well, I'm called Ali and I'm from here. Are you looking for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have an uncle called Ali?

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Yes! All my uncles are called Ali!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. Well do any of your uncles have a stall in the Bazaar in Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Um... no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well do you know if anyone here does?

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: That's a difficult question to answer. I don't know anyone else's uncles.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The 'Asp and Snake'? What a strange name for a bar.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Maybe around these parts. Were you expecting it to have 'Ali' in the name?

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: I did think about calling it 'Ali's', but then it'd get confused with the Camel Shop, the Kebab House, the Mayor's residence...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I get your point. It's a perfectly fine name.

lines.speaker: Ali the Barman
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?
